title: Property Consultant - Mahindra Lifespace - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Mahindra Lifespace - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
We at Mahindra Lifespace are looking for an experienced Property Consultant based out of Varanasi. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Mahindra Lifespace:
Mahindra Lifespace is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mahindra Lifespace!
